caption: Step 1: Open the Indian eVisa portal home page
description: Open the Indian eVisa portal home page
narration: Welcome, traveler. Open the Indian eVisa portal. All those colors feel like a bureaucratic rangoli. The quest begins now.

caption: Step 2: Open the eVisa application form start page
description: Open the eVisa application form start page
narration: Hit Apply like it's a win-a-million-dollars link. Boom, the form appears, blue, white, and ready for your life story.

caption: Step 3: Select nationality and passport type for the applicant
description: Select nationality and passport type for the applicant
narration: Tell them who you are. United States. Ordinary Passport. Diplomatic passport holders can skip this tutorial.

caption: Step 4: Choose the port of arrival for the application
description: Choose the port of arrival for the application
narration: Choose your Port of Arrival. Today we're catching sea breeze at Agatti Seaport. Fancy. And now the portal enters its meditation break.
fallback_narration: Choose the port of arrival and wait for the portal.

caption: Step 5: Fill date of birth and email confirmation
description: Fill date of birth and email confirmation
narration: We're back. Add the birth date and your email. Use one you actually check, not batman123 at gmail.
fallback_narration: Fill the birth date and email.

caption: Step 6: Choose visa service: eTourist Visa (30 Days)
description: Choose visa service: eTourist Visa (30 Days)
narration: Choose the service: 30-Day e-Tourist Visa. The taster menu of visas. Tourism, recreation, all the hits.

caption: Step 7: Set expected date of arrival and acknowledge instructions
description: Set expected date of arrival and acknowledge instructions
narration: Set the arrival date and tick the instructions box. We are almost at the good part.
fallback_narration: Set the arrival date and acknowledge the instructions.

caption: Step 8: Stop at captcha step for safe, non-submitting demo
description: Stop at captcha step for safe, non-submitting demo
narration: Final boss: captcha. We stop here for safety, but India is right around the corner.
fallback_narration: And that's a wrap for Overpass.
